transcript.clean_text: dry open savannah it must be stage 13 of le welter well omar freya and max shachmann not taking the start today freyja due to injuries and shackman due to exhaustion after the heat of the previous days then all of a sudden the pellet and having to face almost 204 kilometers in temperatures exceeding 37 celsius once again remarkable well an expected bunch sprint was on the cards but three riders went up the road early diego rubio of burgos we had alvaro cuadras of cairo and luis angel mate of us well the control was offered up by the chase and to be honest it wasn't a big gap that was ever allowed in fact there was a moment where the breakaway almost looked like it was about to give up the ghost it hovered around about the two minute mark the gap did close down dramatically once the threat of crosswinds due to a turn in the road started to raise their head in the end there was no wind and the splits that indeed did happen during the day turned out to be rather benign fabio jacobson his first welter stage win was exactly two years ago and it looked like he was going to have another one average pace for the first two hours 38.2 kilometers per hour that was well below the expected pace of the day everyone it seems worried about the mountain still to come no worries for the breakaway they've done their job but of course some nerves as well within the pack the late positioning of the intermediate sprint with 11 kilometers to go meant that there were a few that were willing to take on fabio jacobson for it so he rode forward and indeed enjoyed 20 points to add to his tally well then the teams were getting into approach order and the reason was at 3.2 kilometers from home very close to that crucial three kilometer line there was a series of turns and roundabouts to be dealt with before the line as a result some of the gc teams were mixing it up with the sprinters the long lead out train as expected for dikernic quickstep took control unfortunately they lost their man in one of the turns jakobson out of position had to battle back in or maybe not taking the lines that he wanted to and the script certainly wasn't there for him looking down at his bike a suggestion of a puncture later on and it left trent in on the back of a magic carpet ride from dickernick quickstep would they survive would they reconfigure and who would it be seneschal the favored choice he was going to go for it but round the outside in the push for the line alexander krieger went expecting to lead out sasha modello but when he looked over his shoulder modeler wasn't there and as a result it was down to a mano amano trenton versus cena shall and on the throw it went to the frenchman daenezy with a good strong finish as well on the day team bike exchange had done so much work the day prior leaving it to mesget to throw to the line seneschal with an unexpected win an emotional one for him as well trenton well despite missing out again after doing so much work the stage prior remained well complementary i have to say it was nice to see such sportsmanship he offered up florence and charles congratulations almost immediately an unexpected winner then celestial ahead of trenton daenerys devolve your top five alligator einhorn soto was in there oliveira and egan bernal riding it home and shaking his head when he crossed the line as the gc men were mixed in with the pack so it is that odd christian iking stays in the lead as we head to the mountains here's an advantage of 58 seconds ahead of guillen mata roglich stalking though a minute and 56 down odd christian may get a free hand or will he be called to duty for louis main keys who wants a top 10 finish here stage 14 the word pico tells you what we're dealing with we start climbing it's a very busy weekend lumpy more than that it's a mountain top finish we'll have two of them this weekend something very much to look forward to as the mountains beckon and we leave the flat lands on this year's welter you
